expectations.text: correct_command: Uses force create element_like translational_spring_damper (not single_component_force or bushing)
expectations.evidence: Response uses 'force create element_like translational_spring_damper' in both the main example and complete example block
stiffness = 5000.0 present in both code examples and the parameter table
damping = 100.0 present in both code examples and the parameter table
displacement_at_preload = 250.0 used correctly; response even explicitly states 'Free length is displacement_at_preload, not length'

expectations.text: marker_references: References both i_marker_name and j_marker_name
expectations.evidence: Both i_marker_name and j_marker_name are present in the spring-damper command

expectations.text: explains_when_to_use: Explains that spring_damper is for 1-DOF along a line of action
expectations.evidence: Intro states markers 'define the line of action of the spring'; Key Rules section explains 'The I and J markers define the line of action; Adams measures the scalar distance between them'
